name: Gloria's Pesto Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Wisconsin Monterey Jack Cheese - cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine dressing ingredients; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine potatoes, celery, onion, pepper, and Monterey Jack cheese.
3. Add dressing to the potato mixture and toss lightly.
4. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
5. Chill.
This recipe serves 6.
Tip: Wisconsin Style Havarti cheese delivers the same creamy texture when substituted for Monterey Jack cheese in this recipe.
